info.title: DigitalService API
info.description: Multi-tenant Go/Gin + MongoDB travel API. All GET requests are open reads: tenant-scoped ones (destinations, blogs, cars, and every `/admin/*` list/get) only need `X-API-Key` to identify the tenant, and platform-level ones (`/platform/tenants`, `/platform/admins`) need no auth at all. Every mutating request (POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE) still requires the appropriate auth: `X-API-Key` for tenant-scoped writes, additionally a Bearer token with the `admin` role for `/admin/*` writes, and a Bearer token with the `superadmin` role for `/platform/*` writes. Tenant-scoped writes also pass through SubscriptionMiddleware — a tenant with an inactive/expired subscription gets 402 — except the five customer-facing lead/capture forms (`/bookings`, `/rentals`, `/airport-transfers`, `/contact`, `/newsletter`), which are always accepted regardless of subscription state. If a tenant has a `domain` set (see `PUT /platform/tenants/{id}/domain`), every tenant-scoped request also passes through domain-bound key validation: a request carrying an `Origin` or `Referer` header that doesn't match that domain is rejected with 403, even with a valid `X-API-Key` — this only applies to browser-originated requests, since server-to-server calls send neither header.

servers.description: Same host that serves this docs page

ApiKeyAuth.name: X-API-Key
ApiKeyAuth.description: Identifies the tenant. Format sk_live_<64 hex>, shown once at tenant creation / rotate-key. If the tenant has a domain set, this key is only accepted from requests whose Origin/Referer matches it (see PUT /platform/tenants/{id}/domain).

BearerAuth.description: Carries user_id, role, tenant_id. Obtained from /login (tenant users) or /platform/login (superadmin).

Unauthorized.description: Missing/invalid API key or bearer token

Forbidden.description: Token role/tenant does not match what this route requires

PaymentRequired.description: Tenant subscription is inactive or expired

Lang.name: lang
Lang.description: Locale for translatable fields. Falls back to the Accept-Language header, then to "en" if omitted or unsupported.

post.description: Public. Returns a Bearer token with role `superadmin`.

get.description: Public — no auth required.

put.description: Refuses to suspend the last active user.
Omit new_password to auto-generate one, returned once. Provided values need 8+ chars.
Verifies current_password first; new_password must be 8+ chars.

post.description: Returns the tenant's raw api_key exactly once. If contact_email is set, also bootstraps a first admin tenant-user login and returns login.password once.

get.description: Public — no auth required.
Public — no auth required.

put.description: Binds this tenant's X-API-Key to a domain. Once set, TenantMiddleware rejects requests whose Origin/Referer doesn't match it, even with a valid key. Stored lowercase, without scheme/path/port.

post.description: plan is one of free|basic|pro|enterprise, defaults to free. 409 if the tenant already has one. Status starts active with a 30-day period.

get.description: Public — no auth required. Includes `lastEditedBy` — the display name of the platform superadmin who last created/updated it (not a tenant user, since subscriptions are only ever managed via /platform routes) — when known.

post.description: Sets status to canceled; plan/period left intact. From this point the tenant's own writes get 402 until a superadmin sets a new plan.
Public but still requires X-API-Key to identify which tenant to authenticate against.
role must be admin|staff (defaults to staff). Any other value, including superadmin, returns 400 invalid role. Omit password to auto-generate.

get.description: X-API-Key only — no admin token needed to read.

put.description: Omit new_password to auto-generate one, returned once. Provided values need 8+ chars.
Admin or staff. Verifies current_password first; new_password must be 8+ chars.

get.description: All query params are optional and combine as AND filters. Only active destinations are returned. Translatable fields (overview, highlights, activities, inclusions, exclusions, accommodation, meal_plan, difficulty, itinerary day text) are resolved to a single locale per `lang` — see `#/components/parameters/Lang`.
Translatable fields are resolved to a single locale per `lang` — see `#/components/parameters/Lang`.

Active and inactive, with translatable fields returned as full locale maps (e.g. `{"en": "...", "mn": "..."}`) rather than resolved to one language, so the CMS can edit every language at once. Each item includes `lastEditedBy` — the display name of the tenant user who last created/updated it — when known.

post.description: Full model — unset fields default to zero value. Translatable fields (overview, highlights, activities, inclusions, exclusions, accommodation, meal_plan, difficulty, and itinerary day title/description/overnight/activities/meals) are locale maps keyed by language code, e.g. `{"en": "...", "mn": "..."}`. A locale may be omitted; reads fall back to `en`.

overview.en: A 7-day journey through the dunes, canyons and nomadic camps of the Gobi.
overview.mn: Говийн элсэн манхан, хавцал, нүүдэлчдийн буудлаар дамжих 7 хоногийн аялал.

en: Camel trek through the Khongoryn Els dunes
Overnight in a nomadic ger camp

description.en: Drive to Yolyn Am ice canyon in the Gurvan Saikhan mountains.
Camel trek among Mongolia's largest sand dunes.

get.description: Returns the destination regardless of active status, with translatable fields as full locale maps. Includes `lastEditedBy` — the display name of the tenant user who last created/updated it — when known.

put.description: Partial update ($set). Translatable fields can be updated per-locale via dot notation, e.g. `{"overview.mn": "..."}`.

get.description: Published only. Translatable fields (title, excerpt, content, quote) are resolved to a single locale per `lang` — see `#/components/parameters/Lang`.
Translatable fields are resolved to a single locale per `lang` — see `#/components/parameters/Lang`.

Drafts and published, for management views. Optional status query param filters to "draft" or "published". Each item includes `lastEditedBy` — the display name of the tenant user who last created/updated it — when known.

post.description: Created as draft regardless of body. Title, excerpt, content, and quote are locale maps keyed by language code, e.g. `{"en": "...", "mn": "..."}`. A locale may be omitted; reads fall back to `en`.

title.en: When is the best time to visit Mongolia?
title.mn: Монголд аялахад тохиромжтой хугацаа хэзээ вэ?

excerpt.en: A month-by-month guide to timing your journey.

get.description: Returns the blog regardless of status, including full content. Includes `lastEditedBy` — the display name of the tenant user who last created/updated it — when known.

put.description: Partial update. Translatable fields can be updated per-locale via dot notation, e.g. `{"title.mn": "..."}`.

post.description: Customer submits a tour booking. Always accepted regardless of the tenant's subscription state — exempt from SubscriptionMiddleware.

get.description: X-API-Key only — no admin token needed to read. Each item includes `lastEditedBy` — the display name of the tenant user who last changed its status — when known.
X-API-Key only — no admin token needed to read. Includes `lastEditedBy` — the display name of the tenant user who last changed its status — when known.
Public read — X-API-Key only. Optional tour/partner query params filter by related_tour/related_partner. `review` is resolved to a single locale per `lang` — see `#/components/parameters/Lang`.

With `review` returned as a full locale map (e.g. `{"en": "...", "mn": "..."}`) rather than resolved to one language, so the CMS can edit every language at once. Each item includes `lastEditedBy` — the display name of the tenant user who last created/updated it — when known.

post.description: star (1-5 integer) and review are required. review is a locale map keyed by language code, e.g. `{"en": "...", "mn": "..."}` — a locale may be omitted; reads fall back to `en`. The related_* fields are free-form references — a name or an external id.

review.en: The Gobi tour exceeded every expectation.

get.description: Returns the review with its full locale map intact — not exposed publicly (the storefront only ever lists reviews). Includes `lastEditedBy` — the display name of the tenant user who last created/updated it — when known.

put.description: Partial update. If star is present it must be an integer between 1 and 5. review can be updated per-locale via dot notation, e.g. `{"review.mn": "..."}`.

get.description: Public read — X-API-Key only. Active partners; optional tag query param filters by tag. Title and description are resolved to a single locale per `lang` — see `#/components/parameters/Lang`.
Public read — X-API-Key only. Title and description are resolved to a single locale per `lang` — see `#/components/parameters/Lang`.

Active and inactive, with title/description returned as full locale maps (e.g. `{"en": "...", "mn": "..."}`) rather than resolved to one language, so the CMS can edit every language at once. Each item includes `lastEditedBy` — the display name of the tenant user who last created/updated it — when known.

post.description: name and slug are required. name and tag are plain strings (not translated). title and description are locale maps keyed by language code, e.g. `{"en": "...", "mn": "..."}`. products is a list of the partner's offerings (not translated); related_review optionally links a featured review by id.

title.en: Authentic ger camps in the Gobi

description.en: Family-run ger camps across the southern Gobi.

products.name: Standard ger stay
products.description: Twin-bed traditional ger with shared facilities.

get.description: Returns the partner regardless of active status, with title/description as full locale maps. Includes `lastEditedBy` — the display name of the tenant user who last created/updated it — when known.

put.description: Partial update. Translatable fields can be updated per-locale via dot notation, e.g. `{"title.mn": "..."}`.

example.title.en: Award-winning ger camps in the Gobi

delete.description: Soft delete — sets is_active to false, removing it from public reads.

post.description: Customer requests a car rental. Always accepted regardless of the tenant's subscription state — exempt from SubscriptionMiddleware.

get.description: X-API-Key only — no admin token needed to read. Each item includes `lastEditedBy` — the display name of the tenant user who last changed its status — when known.
X-API-Key only — no admin token needed to read. Includes `lastEditedBy` — the display name of the tenant user who last changed its status — when known.

post.description: Customer requests a pickup/drop-off. Always accepted regardless of the tenant's subscription state — exempt from SubscriptionMiddleware.

get.description: X-API-Key only — no admin token needed to read. Each item includes `lastEditedBy` — the display name of the tenant user who last changed its status — when known.
X-API-Key only — no admin token needed to read. Includes `lastEditedBy` — the display name of the tenant user who last changed its status — when known.

post.description: Contact form submission. Always accepted regardless of the tenant's subscription state — exempt from SubscriptionMiddleware.

example.name: Tomás Ibarra
example.subject: Group booking for 15 people
example.message: Hi, we're a university alumni group looking to book the Gobi Desert Classic for 15 people in July 2027.

get.description: X-API-Key only — no admin token needed to read. Each item includes `lastEditedBy` — the display name of the tenant user who last changed its status — when known.

post.description: Newsletter signup form. Always accepted regardless of the tenant's subscription state — exempt from SubscriptionMiddleware. Idempotent: resubmitting the same email is a no-op, not a duplicate error.

get.description: X-API-Key only — no admin token needed to read.

delete.description: Unsubscribes/removes the subscriber. Requires an admin-role Bearer token.

get.description: Requires an admin-role Bearer token (unlike other admin lists, which are X-API-Key only). Each customer includes counts of its related bookings/rentals/airport transfers, not the records themselves — see the detail endpoint for full related data. Also includes `lastEditedBy` — the display name of the tenant user who last created/updated it — when known.

Requires an admin-role Bearer token (unlike other admin detail reads, which are X-API-Key only). Returns the customer with its full related bookings, rentals, and airport transfers. Includes `lastEditedBy` — the display name of the tenant user who last created/updated it — when known.

post.description: Streams the file to Cloudinary and returns its public URL. `folder` is optional; omit it to upload to Cloudinary's root.
